case_title: KARRIEM ADAMS VS. WILLIAM GWIRE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-20-2016 CONTINUED TO DEC-20-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-20-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KARRIEM ADAMS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-20-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-05-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2016 CONTINUED TO FEB-07-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KARRIEM ADAMS, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-18-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-04-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2017 CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAMS, KARRIEM AS TO DEFENDANT GWIRE, WILLIAM DBA GWIRE LAW OFFICES GLASSNER, BRUCE SINGH, UJVALA KAWAII, THOMAS H. DOES 1 THROUGH 50, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-10-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-09-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-18-2016
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KARRIEM ADAMS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-20-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-06-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-18-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KARRIEM ADAMS, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-07-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-23-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. THE FEB-07-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-18-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-20-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-10-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-20-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by or on behalf of Plaintiff. Case Dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to July 18, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to FEB-07-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; Clerk MOlopernes/YMazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
